name: Tier 1
description: Clear, single fallacies in short passages.

name: Tier 2
description: Mixed fallacies; the count is hidden.

name: Review I
description: A review checkpoint — always open. Some passages contain no fallacies.

name: Tier 4
description: New fallacies join the mix; subtler writing.

name: Tier 6
description: The growing taxonomy in realistic passages.

name: Review II
description: A second review checkpoint — always open.

name: Tier 8
description: Subtler moves: diversion, circular reasoning, misplaced authority.

name: Final Review
description: A capstone review — always open. Mark only what is truly faulty.
